info.title: simple-template-renderer
info.description:
A simple template renderer that takes a variables JSON file, targets a file or a directory, and will perform simple find and replace based on the variables JSON, outputting the files to a specified location.

To get started, install the tool as a global `dotnet tool` and enter `simple-template-renderer.exe --help` to see the available options.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
A simple template rendering tool that takes a JSON file 
with a list of key/value pairs, a target file or directory, 
and an output file or directory. It goes through the indicated file(s), 
performs a find/replace on the file contents, 
and writes the new file(s) to the specified output location. 
Optionally, it can also transform the file paths.

commands.name: dir
commands.description: Recursively render template content starting in a specified directory.

options.name: gitignore
options.description: The path to an optional gitignore file to filter out content when performing the operation.

options.name: transformFilePath
options.description: Apply transform variables to file paths.

arguments.name: template
arguments.description: The directory of the template content.

arguments.name: output
arguments.description: The directory where the rendered content should be placed.

arguments.name: variables
arguments.description: The path to a JSON file with a flat object of template variables and their values.

options.name: transformFilePath
options.description: Apply transform variables to file paths.

arguments.name: template
arguments.description: The file path to the template file.

arguments.name: output
arguments.description: The file path where the rendered content should be placed.

arguments.name: variables
arguments.description: The path to a JSON file with a flat object of template variables and their values.
